conservative.name: Incite Righteous Mob
conservative.requirements: 10 favour. You must invoke this blessing in the presence of a prominent fire, where you preach for several minutes as your audience looks on

success.description: Your audience becomes an unruly and hate-filled mob
As above, and you can suggest a target to the mob on whom to unleash their righteous anger

chaosStar.description: The mob decides you are insufficiently pious...
